Our Portfolio

Recent Projects in Buckinghamshire

Browse our portfolio of completed porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrade installations across Amersham, Chesham, and surrounding areas.

Porcelain Patio

Modern Porcelain Patio - Hemel Hempstead

Hemel Hempstead, HP3
July 202490m²

A stunning 90m² modern porcelain patio installation featuring Kandla grey tiles with elegant two-tone border detailing. The project included professionally recessed manholes and seamless integration with bi-fold doors.

Full Landscaping

Egyptian Limestone Patio with Herringbone Pattern

Beaconsfield, HP9
December 2025120m²

A total garden refurbishment featuring Egyptian limestone paving with herringbone detailed work, new turf area, water feature and front drive transformation.

Full Landscaping

Garden Transformation - Bourne End

Bourne End, SL8
February 202475m²

A total garden refurbishment featuring a retaining wall with glass balustrade, new porcelain patio and composite decking area. A complete outdoor transformation.

Glass Balustrade

Glass Balustrade Balcony

Beaconsfield, HP9
September 202518m

Stunning frameless glass balustrade installation for a first-floor balcony, providing safety without compromising the panoramic countryside views.

Porcelain Patio

Wood-Effect Porcelain Patio

Little Chalfont, HP7
August 202538m²

Beautiful wood-effect porcelain patio that combines the warmth of timber with the durability and low maintenance of porcelain.

Composite Decking

Multi-Level Decking

Great Missenden, HP16
July 202555m²

Multi-level composite decking installation creating distinct zones for dining, lounging, and entertaining on a sloping garden.

Start Your Project
OLIVER CHARLESGARDEN DESIGN & BUILD

Family-run garden design and build specialists in Amersham, Buckinghamshire. Transforming outdoor spaces with porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrades since 2015.
